Sidekick · Last updated: July 1, 2026

Sidekick Agents Support

Product: Sidekick Agents AI work assistant

Contact

injooinjoo@gmail.com

Please include your device model, app version, the screen where the issue happened, and the steps to reproduce it. Do not send passwords, one-time codes, or sensitive credentials by email.

Account deletion

In the app, go to My Info > Account > Delete Account and Data.

Payment

This build does not support in-app purchases or subscriptions.

Privacy

https://www.injookim.com/sidekick/privacy/

Privacy Policy · Account Deletion
